label: content
narrative: Lesson 08-01 section opener with two term entries (サービス, サービスマネジメント). Section title normalized from two-line OCR ('サービスマネジメントと\nITIL') to 'サービスマネジメントとITIL' — semantically equivalent. Definitions match source prose verbatim. zh and en translations faithful, with the contrast between project-vs-service management preserved.
